overall.description: First-person exploration through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city district featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, canal walkways, and futuristic architecture. The footage transitions from a pedestrian promenade alongside a waterway to a street-level view of a distinctive corporate tower, showcasing the dense urban environment of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with digital billboards

events.description: passing by a pedestrian walking in the same direction along the promenade
approaching the canal edge, waterway becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete promenade, passing large digital billboards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking ahead on the promenade
pedestrian ascending the stairs on the left side of the walkway

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying animated food advertisements with bright colors
elevated concrete transit structure running parallel to the walkway
tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements and glowing neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet concrete promenade with a massive digital billboard on the left displaying animated advertisements. The camera moves forward past sparse pedestrians, with an elevated monorail track visible in the distance and a cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side boardwalk with neon city views

events.description: turning slightly right to follow the curve of the canal walkway
approaching the dense neon-lit building complex ahead, reflections visible on water

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden canal walkway, moving toward the illuminated skyscrapers while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: couple standing by the railing looking out at the water
pedestrian walking toward the camera along the narrow pathway

entered.detail: narrow water canal with greenish water reflecting neon lights from buildings
metal and glass safety railing separating the walkway from the water
cardboard and trash floating on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden boardwalk alongside a greenish canal, with the neon skyscraper cluster now directly ahead. The camera passes a couple standing by the railing and navigates the narrow walkway as the urban canyon walls close in, reflecting colorful neon lights on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk urban canyon approaching exit stairs

events.description: turning right toward the exit stairs leading away from the canal
screen fades to black indicating a change in location or time

agents.ego_description: continuing along the canal then turning toward a stairway exit, surrounded by towering neon advertisements and the overpass structure

entered.detail: elevated highway or walkway structure with red lighting underneath
concrete stairs leading upward from the canal level to the street above

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues through the dense urban canyon with neon signs illuminating the scene from all sides. The camera approaches an exit staircase on the right while the Watson Overpass structure looms ahead, before the screen fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with corporate tower and transit overpass

events.description: fade from black reveals new location with distinctive red and yellow corporate tower
camera pans right to show the overpass and surrounding street-level buildings
yellow sports car passes by on the wet street below

agents.ego_description: standing still and panning camera to observe the towering corporate structure and surrounding architecture from street level

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving along the wet asphalt street

entered.detail: distinctive hexagonal tower with red and yellow geometric patterns and large 03 signage
elevated green transit track crossing overhead against the gray sky
large digital screen displaying food advertisements at street level
text overlay indicating location as Watson Overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to street level revealing a massive red and yellow corporate tower with 03 signage against an overcast sky. The camera pans right to show the Watson Overpass, a green elevated transit track, and street-level billboards. A yellow sports car drives past on the wet asphalt as the camera surveys the new location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a wide pedestrian promenade into a dense urban canyon before opening up at the base of a corporate tower. It begins on a wet concrete walkway beneath a massive digital billboard, gliding past sparse pedestrians toward a distant cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers. As the camera transitions onto a wooden boardwalk, the environment narrows into a canal-side path where colorful neon lights reflect off greenish water and the surrounding buildings close in. The scene then pushes further into the illuminated urban canyon toward an exit staircase and the looming Watson Overpass before shifting to a street-level perspective. Finally, the view expands to reveal a massive red and yellow corporate tower under an overcast sky, panning across a green elevated transit track as a yellow sports car speeds past on the wet asphalt.
